Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the BMT2 family. {ECO:0000255|HAMAP-Rule:MF_03044}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=adenosine(2142) in 25S rRNA + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = N(1)-methyladenosine(2142) in 25S rRNA + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:43784, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:10691, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:10692, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:74411, ChEBI:CHEBI:74491; EC=2.1.1.286; Evidence={ECO:0000255|HAMAP-Rule:MF_03044, ECO:0000269|PubMed:23558746};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: S-adenosyl-L-methionine-dependent methyltransferase that specifically methylates the N(1) position of adenine 2142 in 25S rRNA. N(1)-methyladenine(2142) in 25S rRNA is present in helix 65, a region that accounts for most of the intersubunit surface of the large subunit. {ECO:0000255|HAMAP-Rule:MF_03044, ECO:0000269|PubMed:23558746}.
